# Aakar IAS
> India's premium bilingual (Hindi & English) current affairs platform for UPSC, MPPSC, and State PSC aspirants.

## Key Pages
- /current-affairs — Daily current affairs articles
- /editorial — Analysis & editorial articles  
- /mppsc — MPPSC exam preparation hub
- /upsc — UPSC exam preparation hub
- /general-awareness — Static GK reference topics
- /online-courses — Live & recorded coaching courses
- /publications — Books & study materials
- /free-pdf — Downloadable PDF study materials
- /test-series — Mock test series
- /weekly — Weekly current affairs compilations
- /monthly — Monthly current affairs compilations
- /monthly-pdf — Monthly/yearly PDF downloads
